nasb.text: But He knew what they were thinking, and He said to the man with the withered hand, “Get up and come forward!” And he got up and came forward.

esv.text: But he knew their thoughts, and he said to the man with the withered hand, “Come and stand here.” And he rose and stood there.

cnv.text: 耶穌知道他們的意念，就對那一隻手枯乾了的人說：“起來，站在當中！”那人就起來站著。

ccb.text: 耶稣知道他们的心思，就对那个右手萎缩的人说：“起来，站在大家面前！”那人就起来站在那里。

csbs.text: 耶稣知道他们的意念，就对那手枯萎的人说：“起来，站到中间来！”那人就起来，站着。
